title: 1. Quick form
content: You describe your problem and provide basic details about your application.

title: 2. Initial review
content: I review your case and check if I can help.

title: 3. Scope & estimate
content: I propose what to fix first, with a clear scope, timeline, and price.

title: 4. Short call (if needed)
content: We clarify details and confirm the scope.

title: 5. Fixes
content: I implement targeted improvements - from bugs to UI and performance.

title: 6. Handover
content: You get a more stable application.
